pi_items.source: Jenkins log recorder configuration. This is a user-defined name for a custom log recorder. Per Jenkins documentation on log recorders (https://www.jenkins.io/doc/book/system-administration/viewing-logs/), users can create custom log recorders with any name they choose. The name 'git-debug-recorder' is appropriate for the task of debugging Git-related issues.

Official Jenkins Git Plugin documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/git/hudson/plugins/git/package-summary.html). The package hudson.plugins.git is the official package for the Jenkins Git Plugin. FINE is a valid java.util.logging.Level from the standard Java logging framework (https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/util/logging/Level.html). According to Jenkins logging documentation (https://docs.cloudbees.com/docs/cloudbees-ci-kb/latest/client-and-managed-controllers/configure-loggers-for-jenkins), FINE is an appropriate level for detailed Git debugging.

Official Jenkins Git Client Plugin documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/git-client/org/jenkinsci/plugins/gitclient/package-summary.html). The package org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient is the official package for the Git Client Plugin. FINE is a valid java.util.logging.Level. Jenkins logging documentation confirms FINE is used for detailed debugging information.

Official Jenkins Credentials Plugin documentation (https://javadoc.jenkins.io/plugin/credentials/com/cloudbees/plugins/credentials/package-summary.html and https://plugins.jenkins.io/credentials/). The package com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials is the official package for the CloudBees Credentials Plugin. WARNING is a valid java.util.logging.Level from the standard Java logging framework (https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/api/java/util/logging/Level.html).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a Jenkins log recorder named 'git-debug-recorder' with three configured loggers: hudson.plugins.git at FINE level (for detailed Git plugin debugging), org.jenkinsci.plugins.gitclient at FINE level (for detailed Git client API debugging), and com.cloudbees.plugins.credentials at WARNING level (for credentials-related issues). All three package names correspond to actual Jenkins plugins with official documentation, and both FINE and WARNING are valid Java logging levels. The task is non-synthetic and involves live configuration of a real Jenkins instance.
